item.title: The Role of FAPI PET/CT in the Assessment of Inflammatory Diseases.
item.description: Seminars in nuclear medicine - Review - PET/CT imaging with radiolabeled fibroblast activation protein inhibitors (FAPI), as an emerging modality for imaging fibroinflammatory diseases, targets activated fibroblasts involved in active ti...

item.title: Letter: Beyond the Mucosa-Strengthening the Case for Transmural Healing as a Monitoring Target in Crohn's Disease.
Use of Intestinal Ultrasound in a Tight monitoring approach in Crohn's disease: a multicentre prospective study.
item.description: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association - Intestinal ultrasound (IUS) is increasingly used to monitor Crohn's disease (CD) activity, yet its optimal role in tight monitoring strategies remains unclear. We aimed to assess the predictive rol...
